key_risks: Hotter-than-expected CPI could pressure all equities including defensives
Treasury auction supply may lift yields and weigh on rate-sensitive holdings
ECB decision spillover could increase cross-asset volatility

portfolio.rationale: Recent 7d outperformance and defensive characteristics around inflation releases
Defensive sector with positive recent momentum and resilience to CPI/PPI prints
Lower volatility exposure expected to outperform amid data-driven volatility
Quality dividend tilt benefits from any rotation away from growth on inflation news
Modest allocation to capture potential yield curve response to upcoming data

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated in defensive and quality factors to navigate CPI, PPI, and ECB events within the one-week window while capturing recent relative strength.
rationale_summary: Defensive tilt via healthcare, staples, low-vol, and dividend exposure positioned for inflation data reactions and pre-FOMC positioning.
